name: Calendar

values.name: addDayContent
values.comment: Takes a tuple of (year, month, date) and Html content corresponding to that date
values.type: ( Int, Int, Int ) -> Html a -> CalendarModel a -> CalendarModel a

values.name: catchToAndFromDates
values.comment: Catch the from date and to date of the moved content for use by the user
values.type: CalendarMsg a -> CalendarModel a -> Maybe MovedDates

values.name: deleteDayContent
values.comment: Takes a tuple of (year, month, date) to be deleted
values.type: ( Int, Int, Int ) -> CalendarModel a -> CalendarModel a

values.name: initCalendarModel
values.comment:
The daycontent
    pass in msg type of your html

values.name: setCustomBackButton
values.type: Html a -> CalendarModel a -> CalendarModel a

values.name: setCustomForwardButton
values.type: Html a -> CalendarModel a -> CalendarModel a

values.name: setDayContent
values.comment: Takes a list of day content and sets that as the calendar content
values.type: List ( CalendarDate, Html a ) -> CalendarModel a -> CalendarModel a

values.name: update
values.type: CalendarMsg a -> CalendarModel a -> ( CalendarModel a, Cmd (CalendarMsg a) )

name: Calendar.Types

unions.name: CalendarMsg
unions.comment:
Calendar msg
MovedItem is exposed so that you can subscribe to it and update your side of things
You will have to have a msg that is msg CalendarDate CalendarDate
MovedItem FromDate ToDate

unions.name: DragMsg
unions.comment: Export DragEnd to determine when something has moved

aliases.name: CalendarModel
aliases.type: { months : Dict ( Int, Int ) (InternalMonth a), currentDate : Maybe Date, currentMonth : Int, currentYear : Int, drag : Maybe Drag, movingContent : Maybe (DayContent a), size : Size, config : Config a }

aliases.name: Config
aliases.type: { customDayHeader : Bool, customButtons : Bool, customStuff : CustomStuff a, toggleDragging : Bool, customHeaderHeight : Int, customSidebarWidth : Int }

aliases.name: CustomStuff
aliases.comment: Custom type for user custom html
aliases.type: { forwardButton : Html a, backButton : Html a, headerFormat : String }

aliases.name: DayContent
aliases.type: { dayIndex : Int, weekIndex : Int, content : Html a, theDate : Date }

aliases.name: Drag
aliases.comment: Drag type alias for the drags
aliases.type: { xIndex : Int, startX : Int, currentX : Int, yIndex : Int, startY : Int, currentY : Int }

aliases.name: InternalMonth
aliases.type: { month : Int, year : Int, days : Dict ( Int, Int, Int ) (DayContent a) }

aliases.name: MovedDates
aliases.comment: Moved item holds the to and from CalendarDate
